reviews.review_title: Game is fun but something happened
reviews.review_description: Now when I load up the game it keeps crashing it hasn't always done this but it just stated to
I love the game but I wish banana car and mod menu weren’t as expensive
Hey owner I had the mod menu and I had to factory reset my head set but I don't have it any more I'm in modded server at shop my name is mint vr or mint

developer_response.body: sadly i cant do anything about it since i have no proof you ever bought it, + if it factory resets you keep your stuff edit : hey good news! i found proof you had it, you now have currency to buy it!

This game is so cool it even has a mod menu and the maps are so cool it even has a roller coaster w game definitely download
